Privacy Policy

Last Updated: June 30, 2026

At Craft Shack, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.

Information We Collect

We may collect:

  • Name
  • Email address
  • Shipping and billing address
  • Phone number (if provided)
  • Order information
  • Payment details (processed securely by a third-party payment provider)

How We Use Your Information

We use your information to:

  • Process and deliver orders
  • Communicate about your purchases
  • Respond to customer enquiries
  • Improve our website and services
  • Send promotional emails if you have opted in

Sharing Your Information

We do not sell your personal information. We may share limited information with trusted third parties such as:

  • Payment processors
  • Shipping providers
  • Website hosting services

Data Security

We take reasonable measures to protect your information from unauthorised access, loss, or misuse.

Cookies

Our website may use cookies to improve your browsing experience and analyse website traffic.

Your Rights

You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information by contacting us.

Contact

For privacy-related questions, please contact us at:

Email: support@craftshack.example.com
